stage: S5 (Multi-board Depth & Benefit Parity) / P02 精确、结构化、全文与历史检索

value.user_value: Exact + structured retrieval: a professional user can look up any document by its exact 文号/DOI and get it as the first result 100% of the time (100/100 on the test corpus), and filter by agency/region/date-range/status with results identical to a SQL baseline. Deterministic retrieval benefit delivered before any semantic layer.
value.why_it_matters: For authoritative sources, the first retrieval benefit is exactness -- the right document number returns the right document, and structured filters behave like SQL, not like a fuzzy guess. This is the deterministic core competitors' semantic-first search often gets wrong.

cost.note: unknown != 0; a deterministic index over a test corpus -> 0 cloud cost.

deployment: NOT_DEPLOYED (exact index + structured filters + test corpus; production worker/cron/data untouched, live build unchanged b189d3cc0703 == T040)
